report.summary: Drafted 4 new tweets (#163-166: Fear & Greed at 8 historic low, Convergence Thursday 6-part mega-thread, Privacy Infrastructure guide, World Chain PoP guide), newsletter v27 triple convergence section, Discord/TG alert v13, content calendar v39 extended through Mar 31, and created 2 SVG social cards (Triple Convergence + Fear & Greed 8).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #163: Fear & Greed hits 8 — historic extreme, Glassnode data shows +38.4% median 90-day return buying below 15 (Wed Mar 26 9AM ET)

Tweet #164: Convergence Thursday mega-thread — 6-part thread covering $13.5B options expiry, 91 SEC ETF rulings on 24 tokens, uncapped options limits on 11 funds, 46-day fear streak setup (Thu Mar 27 6:30AM ET)
Tweet #165: On-Chain Privacy Infrastructure guide drop — Tornado Cash legal aftermath, Railgun, Aztec, Penumbra, compliant privacy in 2026 (Fri Mar 28 2PM ET)
Tweet #166: World Chain & Proof of Personhood — biometric verification, World ID, sybil resistance for DeFi (Sat Mar 29 12PM ET)
Newsletter v27: Triple Convergence Thursday pre-market edition — fear signal analysis, 3 catalyst breakdown, new guides recap
Discord/Telegram Late Night Alert v13: T-minus 30 hours convergence countdown with full catalyst breakdown and 4 new guides
Content calendar v39 extended through Mon Mar 31 (12 pieces: 4 tweets + 1 thread/6 parts + 1 Discord/TG + 1 newsletter)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created

SVG social card: Fear & Greed Index at 8 (1200x630, dark theme with red radial glow, giant '8' number, fear bar visualization, 3 stat boxes)
